productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Response Analogue Black Watch
description: Product descriptionThis adidas Response analogue wrist watch represents what adidas is all about. A solid stainless steel case and black rubber band makes this watch look great on anyone, making it an excellent addition to your wardrobe.Case diameter: 47 mmCase thickness: 14 mmDial shape: RoundPolished black sword hands with luminous accents and lime green sweep seconds for added style, comfort and to view time in low light conditionsApplied polished black Arabic numbers for easy time viewEngraved Arabic numbers and baton markers on outer concave ring to see time easilyAnalogue date aperture above six o'clock markBlack dial with textured grid pattern and polished lime green logo appliqué below twelve o'clock mark for enhanced durability and easy useBlack polyurethane strap with classic triple stripe detailing and polished black stainless steel buckle for added durability and styleTextured inside strap for comfortable and firm FitPolished black polycarbonate bezel with green Arabic numbers for longer watch life and easy view in low light conditionsGlossy black polycarbonate round case for durability and comfortTextured black steel crown with logo for added styleStainless steel screw-in case back for longer watch lifeQuartz movement of time display using a paper-thin piece of synthetic quartz to ensure accurate time measurement10 ATM water resistance tested using the equivalent static depth rating, with resistance  at 100 meters or 330 feet, allowing you to use it even when snorkelling, skin-diving, and swimming
